summary: Adds a local update transcript so one-click updater runs leave behind a small diagnostic record of each step, timing, and restart context.
updatePrompt: Update Planban from piercekearns/planban, verify the plugin and MCP tools are available, then reopen Planban in the Codex in-app browser.
changelogSummary: One-click updates now write a local transcript with step timings and restart context, making failed or suspicious updates easier to inspect without exposing board contents.
